unreleased_commits.author: Copilot
unreleased_commits.message:
Restructure docs: split COMMANDS.md into per-command sub-pages

- Rewrite COMMANDS.md as a high-level overview with has_children for
  just-the-docs parent/child navigation
- Create docs/commands/ with individual pages: validate.md, apply.md,
  report.md, and schema.md (new command)
- Add schema command documentation covering JSON Schema generation
  for .gitrepoforge config files
- Update docs/README.md to list all four commands

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Co-authored-by: JaredHatfield <208119+JaredHatfield@users.noreply.github.com>

unreleased_commits.author: Copilot
unreleased_commits.message:
Add ReportConfig section to root config

Add ReportConfig struct with CollapseDiffs field to control report
command behavior. Uses raw parsing with pointer-based defaulting
(defaults to true) consistent with the existing GitConfig pattern.
